fields.name: ATLANTIC ZONE MONITORING PROGRAM
fields.description: Multidisciplinary ocean monitoring in the northwest Atlantic (physical, chemical, biological data)

fields.name: ATLANTIC ZONE OFF-SHELF MONITORING PROGRAM
fields.description: Off-shelf oceanographic monitoring complementing AZMP

fields.name: BEDFORD BASIN PLANKTON MONITORING PROGRAM
fields.description: Plankton data collection as part of regional ocean observations

fields.name: COMMUNITY AQUATIC MONITORING PROGRAM
fields.description: Involves local groups collecting biological and environmental data to assess estuary and watershed health

fields.name: FISHERY STOCK ASSESSMENTS & INTEGRATED FISHERIES MONITORING
fields.description: Ongoing science programs for stock status, recruitment, population dynamics, and harvest advice (e.g., PFMC, IFMP frameworks). DFO science and stock assessment group initiatives support these

fields.name: ECOSYSTEM APPROACH TO FISHERIES MANAGEMENT
fields.description: Cross-discipline working groups aiming to integrate ecosystem dynamics into fisheries decisions

fields.name: MARINE MAMMAL RESPONSE PROGRAM
fields.description: Incident response network for marine mammals and sea turtles in distress, including strandings and rehabilitation support

fields.name: MARINE MAMMAL WORKING GROUP (INTERNAL ADVISORY)
fields.description: Provides guidance on non-harvest use and management of marine mammals

fields.name: WHALE MONITORING & TRACKING SUPPORT
fields.description: Ongoing coast-wide detection and tracking initiatives in partnership with other organizations (not always labeled as single “program name”)

fields.name: ATLANTIC SALMON WATCH PROGRAM
fields.description: Monitoring of Atlantic salmon captures and observations, with implications for salmon-associated ecosystem interactions (often linked to whale interactions and ecosystem health)

fields.name: INTEGRATED FISHERIES MANAGEMENT PLANS
fields.description: Species/region specific management frameworks guiding quota, fishing rules, seasons etc. (salmon, groundfish, shellfish, etc.)

fields.name: CONSERVATION & PROTECTION
fields.description: Enforcement program including patrols, compliance monitoring, and fisheries regulation enforcement (supports whale interaction avoidance and other protective measures)

fields.name: OPERATION DRIFTNET (SUPPORT)
fields.description: Surveillance operation conducted in partnership with DFO to control illegal fishing; supports broader fisheries enforcement (linked but led by Canadian Forces)

fields.name: VESSEL MONITORING SYSTEM
fields.description: Satellite tracking of licensed fishing vessels to support compliance and resource use monitoring (regional DFO monitoring tool). Historical reference from open data sources

fields.name: MARINE PROTECTED AREAS MONITORING
fields.description: Conservation areas with monitoring and protective regulations (various regions; not a single program but an active DFO portfolio). Often implemented under the Oceans Act framework

fields.name: SPECIES AT RISK RECOVERY PROGRAMS
fields.description: Programs developed under Canada’s Species at Risk Act (SARA) for listed aquatic species (e.g., whales, sea turtles, endangered fish).

fields.name: OCEANS MANAGEMENT CONTRIBUTION PROGRAM
fields.description: Funding for stewardship, monitoring, outreach and marine conservation initiatives with partners

fields.name: LTTM FSRS NEARSHORE MONITORING PROGRAM
fields.description: A long‑term scientific monitoring program that collects nearshore environmental and temperature data to support fisheries research and coastal ecosystem assessment

fields.name: ZONAL MONITORING PROGRAM HFX STN 2
fields.description: Lindsay Beazley

fields.name: WAS REDFISH SERIES
fields.description: Dr. Peter Smith (Revised as No Hydrographic Data collected)

fields.name: CONTINIOUS PLANKTON RECORDER DATA
fields.description: A long‑term, standardized dataset of plankton observations collected by towed recorders to monitor changes in marine ecosystems, biodiversity, and climate over time

fields.name: ZONAL MONITORING PROGRAM SHEDIAC
fields.description: A long‑term DFO monitoring program in the Shediac area of the southern Gulf of St. Lawrence that tracks physical, chemical, and biological ocean conditions Dr. Catherine Johnson (was Mary Kennedy)

fields.name: ZONAL MONITORING PROGRAM BEDFORD BASIN COMPASS PROGRAM
fields.description: A long‑term DFO monitoring program in the bedford basin area that tracks physical, chemical, and biological ocean conditions Andrew Cogswell was Dr. Bill Li (was Mary Kennedy)

fields.name: BEL TEMPERATURE MONITORING PROGRAM
fields.description: A scientific monitoring program that collects long‑term temperature data for research and management purposes(Melisa Wong)

fields.name: BARROW STRAIT REAL-TIME MONITORING PROGRAM
fields.description: An Arctic monitoring program that collects real‑time oceanographic and environmental data in Barrow Strait to support research, navigation safety, and understanding of climate‑driven change

fields.name: ARCTIC OCEAN MONITORING PROGRAM
fields.description: Multidisciplinary ocean monitoring in the Arctic (physical, chemical, biological data)

fields.name: CANADIAN INTEGRATED OCEAN OBSERVING SYSTEM
fields.description: National ocean data integration and observation under the core ocean monitoring & cbservation programs

fields.name: LONG TERM TEMPERATURE MONITORING
fields.description: A long‑term scientific monitoring program that collects temperature data to support fisheries research and coastal ecosystem assessment

fields.name: PACIFIC FISHERY MANAGEMENT COUNCIL
fields.description: A U.S. fisheries management council that applies stock assessment science to provide harvest advice and manage fisheries on the U.S. West Coast

fields.name: MARINE ENVIRONMENTAL QUALITY MONITORING
fields.description: National Marine Environmental Quality (MEQ) Monitoring program for Pollution assessment, habitat protection, and regulatory science

fields.name: SYDNEY BIGHT ICYCLER PROGRAM
fields.description: A DFO ocean monitoring program that uses a moored autonomous vertical profiler (iCycler) in Sydney Bight (NAFO 4Vn) to collect year‑round time‑series measurements of temperature, salinity, and related physical oceanographic variables
